catalog_confirmation.coverage_note: The only valid canonical base outside the maintained entries is Aetna's credentialed, targeted Medicaid directory. It is documented as an alternate Aetna base rather than a separate fully enumerable carrier directory.

idaho.limitation: Accepts api-ida-prd.safhir.io cursor continuations with checkpoints.

molina.limitation: The first unbounded dev run checkpointed 497,700 Location rows before Molina returned a quota-specific HTTP 403 with an advertised reset delay. The importer records retry_not_before, and the external scheduler defers the exact-source checkpoint retry until that boundary; terminal endpoint-wide proof remains pending.

michigan.limitation: The public MHB upstream returned a CapabilityStatement and two advertised opaque-cursor pages from dev for Location, Organization, OrganizationAffiliation, Practitioner, and PractitionerRole. Synthetic _getpagesoffset continuation is not equivalent and remains prohibited. The importer preserves the existing relay-derived source identity but uses the direct upstream for probes. Acquisition remains blocked until checkpoint resume and two matching exhaustive passes prove completeness.

cigna.limitation: Sequential REST pagination at _count=100 preserves Plan-Net network extensions; _count=75 returns false-empty search sets for role, organization, location, service, and affiliation collections. No Bulk. Expected nonempty initial searches retry transient HTTP-200 empty search sets with cooldowns.

caresource.limitation: Dev verification on 2026-07-14 returned public metadata with HTTP 200 and accepted _count=1000. Populated collections return same-origin opaque _page/_searchId continuations, and PractitionerRole advertised about 1.83 million rows. Full-refresh acquisition durably records a pre-scan _summary=count census, checkpoints every opaque next link without the generic page ceiling, and permits terminal completion only when processed and unique candidate resource IDs equal unchanged post-scan census. Any cursor loss, duplicate/count mismatch, or census drift fails closed. A new exhaustive acquisition and downstream proof remain pending. No product membership is inferred from the catalog row.

aetna-commercial-medicare.limitation: OAuth2 client credentials and Bulk; Endpoint collection is unavailable. The separate /providerdirectory Medicaid base has 19 credentialed catalog aliases and only targeted search semantics, so it is not treated as another fully enumerable carrier directory.

humana.limitation: Uses the carrier-wide public FHIR base; catalog product aliases are neutralized and plan/network provenance comes from FHIR resources.

iehp.limitation: Normalizes portal and resource paths to the official public Provider Directory base. Worker-pod probes returned HTTP 200 for metadata, two Practitioner pages, HealthcareService, and InsurancePlan with valid next links; metadata still omits the latter two resources. Public unfiltered REST is demonstrated. Terminal acquisition and downstream artifact/API readiness are recorded separately in the tracked verification snapshot.

arkansas.limitation: Uses synthetic _skip pagination with stable _id sorting. PractitionerRole, Practitioner, Organization, and Location are populated; InsurancePlan, HealthcareService, OrganizationAffiliation, and Endpoint return valid empty Bundles. Terminal acquisition succeeded, and current artifact plus unified/API readiness is recorded in the tracked verification snapshot.

hap.limitation: Rewrites the blocked cursor host and throttles requests to 20 seconds. Initial and rewritten continuation pages were revalidated for all five configured collections.

washington.limitation: Public samples and fresh opaque next links work, but resumed HAPI cursors expire and force a page-one restart: PractitionerRole regressed from 50,800 to 16,800 fetched rows. Bundle count searches report zero for populated resources, and HealthcareService returns HTTP 504 even at _count=1. No authoritative total, stable exhaustive cursor, or reproducible complete pass is verified.

wyoming.limitation: Uses standard _count=100 pagination; PractitionerRole pagination was revalidated after the earlier gateway limit was removed.

health-partners-plans.limitation: Official public Provider Directory FHIR base (source pdfhir_384bff82e94cf93d2aec8af2). A current endpoint dataset is published and its artifact plus unified/API readiness is verified. Strict harness-shaped terminal acquisition proof is not recorded for the historical run, so the next acquisition campaign must capture that proof before superseding the current dataset.

amerihealth-caritas-carrier.limitation: One carrier-level A6 directory is acquired solely from the public 0900 transport. The acquisition row clears plan_name and does not claim NH product membership. Bounded dev-server probes returned HTTP 200 CapabilityStatement and paginated Bundle responses for all A6 resources at 0500, 0900, 1200, 2100, 5400, and 7100; the first two resource IDs were identical across all six bases. Exhaustive equivalence with plan-code bases is not established, so no resource evidence is fanned out and no product membership is inferred for plan-code aliases. No terminal full-acquisition or downstream publication proof is recorded yet.

amerihealth-de.limitation: Plan code 7100 is reachable from dev and returned HTTP 200 for CapabilityStatement plus all A6 resource probes with opaque next links. Its first resource IDs matched 0900 and every other plan-code base, but exhaustive equivalence is not established. It remains probe-only to avoid a duplicate full acquisition or false plan membership; no acquired rows are inferred for this alias.

amerihealth-la.limitation: Plan code 2100 is reachable from dev and returned HTTP 200 for CapabilityStatement plus all A6 resource probes with opaque next links. Its first resource IDs matched 0900 and every other plan-code base, but exhaustive equivalence is not established. It remains probe-only to avoid a duplicate full acquisition or false plan membership; no acquired rows are inferred for this alias.

amerihealth-nc.limitation: Plan code 1200 is reachable from dev and returned HTTP 200 for CapabilityStatement plus all A6 resource probes with opaque next links. Its first resource IDs matched 0900 and every other plan-code base, but exhaustive equivalence is not established. It remains probe-only to avoid a duplicate full acquisition or false plan membership; no acquired rows are inferred for this alias.

amerihealth-dc.limitation: Plan code 5400 is reachable from dev and returned HTTP 200 for CapabilityStatement plus all A6 resource probes with opaque next links. Its first resource IDs matched 0900 and every other plan-code base, but exhaustive equivalence is not established. It remains probe-only to avoid a duplicate full acquisition or false plan membership; no acquired rows are inferred for this alias.

amerihealth-pa.limitation: Plan code 0500 is reachable from dev and returned HTTP 200 for CapabilityStatement plus all A6 resource probes with opaque next links. Its first resource IDs matched 0900 and every other plan-code base, but exhaustive equivalence is not established. It remains probe-only to avoid a duplicate full acquisition or false plan membership; no acquired rows are inferred for this alias.

horizon-nj.limitation: The configured base exposes public R4 metadata with no declared resources, while core searches return HAPI HTTP 403 Access denied by rule. Horizon documents developer registration, an approved Provider Directory API-product subscription, subscription credentials, and OAuth2 client credentials; no authenticated pageable production endpoint has been verified.

texas-tmhp.limitation: Lightweight probe confirms seven populated public collections using stable _id sorting and offset pagination. Endpoint is empty and excluded. This is probe evidence only; no terminal full-import proof is claimed.

nebraska.limitation: Seven public collections use stable _id sorting and offset pagination. Lightweight probe confirms Endpoint is excluded because it returns HTTP 404. UAT continuation is canonicalized before acquisition. This is probe evidence only; no terminal full-import proof is claimed.

uhc.limitation: Optum Flex caps five core collections at 10,000, pagination cannot pass that cap, available filters do not form disjoint exhaustive shards, and Bulk Data export is unavailable. Generic resource acquisition is now blocked in the importer, and plan_graph_complete never satisfies endpoint publication. Flex remains a semantic probe for network-scoped enrichment only; product-scoped UHC provider files require a separate complete-file importer and an explicit product-to-FHIR plan/network crosswalk before evidence can be published.

missouri.limitation: Metadata declares eight directory resources, but Location returns false-empty Bundles above _count=100, Bundle.total reflects only the page size, a Practitioner response exceeds the 20 MiB cap, and HealthcareService and PractitionerRole requests time out. Other resource searches also return contradictory empty Bundles; no stable exhaustive REST or Bulk Data acquisition contract is verified.

maine.limitation: Five collections are anonymously readable with ct cursor pagination. InsurancePlan, HealthcareService, and Endpoint return HTTP 403 and remain excluded. Terminal acquisition succeeded for all five configured collections, and current artifact plus unified/API readiness is recorded in the tracked verification snapshot.

scan.limitation: The server enforces a 1,000-result search ceiling: family=MA has 2,679 Practitioner matches and returns HTTP 413 SearchTooCostly when rows are requested. Fixed name-prefix shards therefore cannot prove completeness. Generic acquisition remains blocked. The importer now implements adaptive half-open _lastUpdated partitions, pre/post unfiltered and ranged census reconciliation, durable retry checkpoints, and twin-pass staged-row proof, but SCAN remains probe-only until a live all-resource campaign produces matching terminal completeness metrics.

centene.limitation: The production base now returns public FHIR metadata from dev egress. Location requires at least one resource search parameter: an _count-only request returns HTTP 400, while address-state=OK with _count=1 returns 200 rows plus a next link. Generic resource acquisition is blocked in the importer because stable exhaustive pagination and equivalent behavior across all directory collections remain unverified.

contra-costa.limitation: Seven public collections follow opaque next-link pagination; Endpoint is unsupported and excluded. The official catalog can return HTTP 403, so the confirmed fallback base is retained. Terminal acquisition succeeded, and current artifact plus unified/API readiness is recorded in the tracked verification snapshot.

alohr.limitation: FHIR REST reads are auth-gated; the maintained GraphQL connector uses tenant alohr. The prior five-resource run is not proof for the corrected contract because the source does not expose organization-affiliation relationships. A fresh four-resource GraphQL acquisition, validation, artifact publication, and unified/API proof are pending.
